contract_summary: Acquires a reference on the ipc_namespace associated with the given inode's superblock. The caller receives an ipc_namespace pointer with an incremented reference count and must release the reference with put_ipc_ns() when no longer needed. The function assumes that inode->i_sb->s_fs_info is a valid, non-NULL pointer to an ipc_namespace; no additional locking or checking is required.
